_comment: Copy this file to <job-name>.json and edit. All fields are optional except targetRole. Omitted list fields fall back to: all skill groups / all roles / featured projects, in their data.ts order.
targetRole: The exact job title you're applying for
summary: 2-3 sentence pitch tailored to this listing. Omit to use the default summary from src/data/profile.ts.
emphasize: Skill names to highlight (must match items in src/data/skills.ts) — these render in the accent colour
skillGroups: Which skill-group labels to include, in order. Omit for all. Labels: Platform & Infrastructure | Cloud & Observability | Languages | Web & Frameworks | Data & Messaging | AI / ML
roles: Company names to include, in order (NASES | Lapz | QualityUnit | DXC Technology). Omit for all.
projects: Project names to include, in order. Omit to use featured projects. See names in src/data/projects.ts.
